title: toxic air
description: im moving from curseforge for multiable reasons
body:
In this world, the air will slowly kill you and you must dig deep

into the ground to survive, learn to survive in the deep dark.

 

to survive go below y 62 (sea level) and stay out of the sun



mod is being remade!!!!

 

This was based on an RP server me and my friends made.

Creator and scripter: Foxardo#5580

Debugger and idea personnel: Lost or unknown

(on discord in case of bugs)

 

-------------------------------Update----------------------------------

Sorry for not telling you this earlier but we slowed development on this mod.

This is due to a lack of knowledge of scripting and coding, (well not coding but you get what I mean)

This project is a learning experience for us, so please don't expect any bugs or fast consistent updates.

Hopefully, we may have a big update by the end of the following Friday, no guarantees.

Thank you for understanding and have a nice day -gamingoverachiever#5580 09/17/2022 and or 17/09/2022

 -------------------------------Update-2----------------------------------

 Hello again due to some bugs And hacking issues the 0.4 update will be delayed,

 I will not be putting a time when it is released but there will be a beta sometime soon

Stay tuned sisterly -gamingoverachiever#5580 09/24/2022 and or 24/09/2022

 -------------------------------Update-3----------------------------------

new year new remake (bc I have formatted my pc and lost the mc files lamo) no date no more info may or can be canceled 

because life may get in the way no guarantees 

 -----------------------small-Update-1----------------------------------

Goodnews mc has support for 19.x so hopefully it will be out for that version

 -----------------------------BIG--Update-4----------------------------

hello long time no see im just here to say that the mod is back on track... at a slow pace time i get a version out here is a little hint:  there's going to be..... endings
 ----------------------news....----------------------------------
the mod is scraped and it is no longer gonna be updated for some time
untill i learn real moding without mcreator
